{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603201713235B0D3CDDD43F9DD59876"}"},"total":300},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7465571771377304344","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"整本书下来轻松有趣，感情线不错，允真和他的二师兄好好磕[害羞]最后的番外让我眼前一亮（感觉作者可以多写写这样的）
期待作者更多的作品啊[飞吻]"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1738220351,"group_id":"7413654323093048382","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N2X776aLoq4Cp9dM5v8YIpc=","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/5687ff917d5044ac8bb63ce94c7b40c4~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776530062&x-signature=%2BsV6ZhHcBgfhvNIVPBBEINvISpk%3D","user_id":"673376997225575","user_name":"咸时芋圆"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"673376997225575","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7413654323093048382","book_info":{"abstract":"万人迷，今穿古。医生张允真猝死，直接穿进网文《太医很忙》里，穿进去以后悲催的发现：自己穿到了同名同姓的炮灰角色太医身上。而且更悲催的是——太医的工作特么的比医生强度还要高！
伺候的都是主子，全年无休007，动辄被威胁要他陪葬。张太医直呼这个班我上不起，一心只想辞职回老家种地。
攻1-太子，霸道总裁型，被人暗算，靠张太医救回一命，从此极度依赖张太医，没事就让他来东宫加夜班。
攻2-太子劲敌三皇子，温文尔雅风流倜傥，腹有诗书满腹经纶，没事就找张太医切磋学习谈天说地。
攻3-敌国沙漠狼王，狂野疯批型，因中剧毒强行掳走张太医要他给自己解毒。张太医死马当成活马医，硬是给治好了。狂野狼王想要留住张太医，并对其强取豪夺墙纸爱。
张太医要疯了，怎么没一个正常人？有病治病啊？！啊不对，疯病治不好。
最后张太医想了个法子——死遁。这个法子好，一觉醒来我就开启新生活了！
结果假死后睁开眼，看到的是清隽的一张脸，那人笑的深情无比“允真，他们都不行，你看我怎么样？”  一句话立意：医者不能自医，唯有真爱渡己","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2o9a726adc2736b76ed1eafae894b5543d~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"发光锦鲤","author_id":"","book_id":"7413654323093048382","book_name":"权贵们索求无度张太医只想退休","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#a09898","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"7778人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":275,"name":"双男主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=275&name=双男主&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":382,"name":"穿书","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=382&name=穿书&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":463,"name":"今穿古","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=463&name=今穿古&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":758,"name":"古代","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=758&name=古代&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":1012,"name":"纯爱","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1012&name=纯爱&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7413654408291942974","read_count":"7778","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"303349"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.5","serial_count":"126","tags":"双男主,穿越,穿书,今穿古,古代,纯爱","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/p2o9a726adc2736b76ed1eafae894b5543d~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779182004&x-signature=eKmBKi057RFYg7V1knonuQLtTBg%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"3142838459048275","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"192"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603201713235B0D3CDDD43F9DD59876"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"8","score_suffix_text":"阅读1小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":11,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":3940,"reply_count":1,"show_pv":5845},"user_action":{"author":0,"author_digg_time":1738221054,"author_reply_time":1738221061,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7468668159036834622","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"说实话，一路看到现在，发现二师兄才是最适合和允真在一起的，不用顾及身份，可以一生一世相伴，随心所欲浪际天涯，而且一心一意满心满眼都是允真的人[爱慕]周静川你小子别太爱
本人不语，只是一味祝周张99[害羞][爱心][爱心]
